entity1.label: AI system
entity1.definition: An AI system as defined in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to a semantically equivalent AI system class in AIRO. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.

entity1.label: AI lifecycle
entity1.definition: The lifecycle of an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to AI lifecycle phase concept in AIRO. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.

entity1.label: AI output
entity1.definition: Output produced by an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to AIRO Output. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.

entity1.label: AI system lifecycle stage
entity1.definition: A stage in the lifecycle of an AI system.
entity1.comments: Close match to AIRO lifecycle phase. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.

entity1.label: AI system category
entity1.definition: A category of AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Broad conceptual match only; used as a category/concept placeholder. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Assessment
entity1.definition: An assessment activity in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV Assessment. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Authorisation
entity1.definition: An authorisation process or state in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV authorisation procedure. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Authority
entity1.definition: An authority in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV Authority. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Benchmark
entity1.definition: A benchmark used for evaluation or comparison in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to VAIR benchmark-related concept. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Chatbot
entity1.definition: A chatbot in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to VAIR Chatbot. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Conformity assessment
entity1.definition: Assessment of conformity in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV ConformanceAssessment. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Conformity assessment procedure
entity1.definition: Procedure for conformity assessment in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV conformance assessment. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Data governance
entity1.definition: Governance of data in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV DataGovernance. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Data quality requirement
entity1.definition: Requirement concerning data quality in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV data quality assessment/management concepts. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Deployer
entity1.definition: A deployer of an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to AIRO AIOperator / operator role. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.

entity1.label: Documentation of assessment
entity1.definition: Documentation produced for an assessment in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to assessment documentation-related concepts. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: General-purpose AI model
entity1.definition: A general-purpose AI model in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to VAIR GeneralAI. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: High-risk AI system
entity1.definition: An AI system classified as high-risk in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Broad close match only; VAIR has many high-risk use-case concepts but no exact high-risk system class. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Human oversight
entity1.definition: Oversight by a human in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV HumanOversight. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Human oversight measure
entity1.definition: A measure ensuring human oversight in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to VAIR HumanOversightMeasure. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Instructions for use
entity1.definition: Instructions provided for use of an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to VAIR InstructionForUse. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Log
entity1.definition: A log record in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to logging-related concept in DPV. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Logging requirement
entity1.definition: Requirement to log or retain logs in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV logging policy. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Market surveillance authority
entity1.definition: Authority responsible for market surveillance in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV national authority. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Post-market monitoring
entity1.definition: Monitoring after market placement in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to VAIR monitoring concept. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Provider
entity1.definition: Provider of an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to AIRO operator/provider role. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.

entity1.label: Quality management system
entity1.definition: A quality management system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to management standard / quality management concepts in DPV. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Risk
entity1.definition: A risk in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV Risk. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Risk assessment
entity1.definition: Assessment of risk in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV RiskAssessment. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Risk management system
entity1.definition: System for managing risk in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV organisation risk management. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Risk mitigation measure
entity1.definition: A measure to mitigate risk in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV RiskMitigationMeasure. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Safety
entity1.definition: Safety in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to VAIR Safety. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Technical documentation
entity1.definition: Technical documentation for an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to VAIR TechnicalDocumentation. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Testing
entity1.definition: Testing of an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to VAIR testing-related concept. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; VAIR.

entity1.label: Traceability
entity1.definition: Traceability in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Matched to DPV traceability-related concept. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Transparency and information
entity1.definition: Transparency and information obligations in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Close match to DPV AI notice / transparency notice concepts. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; DPV.

entity1.label: Use of AI system
entity1.definition: Use of an AI system in the generated EU AI Act ontology.
entity1.comments: Broad close match only; use/activity rather than the system itself. Ontology reference/source: generated EU AI Act ontology; AIRO.
